description: Engagement (shiddukhin) agreeement between Efrayim b. Shemuel and כואנדה bt. Eliyyahu Sūsī, in a beautifully illuminated frame. The prospective bride's name is also listed as Simḥa in line 8. Currency: medin. Dated 1720 CE (1 Elul 5480 AM). Location: Cairo. The engagement is set to last for one year leading up to the wedding. Goitein notes and index card linked below belong to a different shelfmark. Verso: In the right column there is a list of names under the heading "חג פסח ...". The second column contains an outline/draft for a different engagement document between Khalīfa b. Yahuda Ḥasān and Zīna(?) bt. Avraham Bu-Wadiq..(?). ASE/MCD.
description_he: הסכם שידוכים בין אפרים בן שמואל לכוואנדה בת אליהו סוסי, בעיצוב מאויר יפה, קהיר, 1720
